meta.text:
ASMITHA THIRAVIYARASA

A B O U T M E

As an Undergraduate student at the Sri Lanka Institute of Information Technology

(SLIIT), I have gained leadership experience through group projects and I am

currently seeking an internship opportunity in a dynamic IT company. I am

dedicated to completing projects and pay close attention to detail. I am a highly

motivated individual with a strong passion for the IT industry and a keen interest

in exploring and researching new aspects of this ever-evolving field.

E D U C A T I O N

SRI LANKA INSTITUTE OF INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY: FACULTY OF

COMPUTING 

 Reading BSc (Hons) in Information Technology specialized in Software 

C O N T A C T 

Malabe,Colombo, Srilanka

Thuvaaju@gmail.com

+94-777189479

https://www.linkedin.com/in/
asmitha-thiraviyarasa

https://github.com/IT21176210

 Engineering (Jun 2021 -Present)

S K I L L S

T E C H N O L O G Y S K I L L S

React

Node
Javascript
Java
Php

Flutter

Kotlin

Sql

MongoDB

C++
Version Control system
-(Git, Bitbucket)

Software Dev Practices
-(Clickup,Trello)

Microservices

Web servers 
- (Apache, Xampp)

P E R S O N A L S K I L L S

Leardership

Problem Solving

Communication

Adaptability

Time Management

Organization & Planning

Analytical-Thinking

J/Methodist Girls’ High School

 G.C.E Ordinary Level (2016) - Passed with 8A’s, B.

 G.C.E Advanced Level (2019) - Chemistry: B, Physics: C, Biology: S

W O R K E X P E R I E N C E S

Software Engineer Intern, Procons Infotech (Pvt) Ltd Duration: [6 months]

Developed RIC (Royal Institute of Colombo) Mobile application using Flutter with Dart

and Moodle.

Collaborated with a team of developers to deliver a seamless user experience.

Contributed to the development of IESL web Application

P R O J E C T S

Zeni - E-Learning Management System| Web-based System 

 Technologies: React, Node JS,Docker, Kubernetes, MongoDB, PrismaORM, Tailwind 
 Tracking expenses, Course Management | User Management | Assessment and

 Grading | Progress Tracking

Plant Nexus | Mobile Platform for Gardening Community 

 Technologies: Kotlin, MongodbRealm, WebXR, API integration 

 Thriving gardening community | Revolutionizing plant transactions Greener, more 

 sustainable world.

Virtual Dressing Room | Online Shopping Enhancement

 Technologies: ReactJs, NodeJs, ThreeJs, WebXR, MongoDB, API integration

 Addressing size uncertainties | Personalized fittings | AI Chatbot engagement.

Farm Financial Management System (FARMFRESH) | Mobile Application 

 Technologies: Kotlin and Firebase

 Tracking expenses, Income, and overall farm profitability.

Online Banking System | Web-based System 

 Technologies: Java, MySQL, and CSS. 

 Authentication | Account management | Fund transfers | Transaction history.

 
 L A N G U A G E S

English 

Tamil

Sinhala

R E F E R E E S

Ms. Sanjeevi Chandrasiri
M.Sc.(IT)(SLIIT), B.Sc.(Hons)(IT)
(SLIIT), MIEEE, MBCS, MIET
Senior Lecturer - Department of
Information Technology
Year 1 Course Leader
Faculty of Computing
SLIIT - Malabe
Phone: 0117 544 4144
Email: sanji.c@sliit.lk

Thilini Jayalath (thilini.j@sliit.lk)
Lecturer
BSc(Hons) in IT(Specializing in IT),
MSc in IT (SLIIT), MCSSL
Department of Computer Science
and Software Engineering
Faculty of Computing
SLIIT | Malabe Campus

A C H I E V E M E N T S

Completed Diploma in Fluent English – 2021

MongoDB for SQL Professionals(MongoDB University)

Completed the "React JS Tutorial" course(Great Learning Academy)

Completed JavaScript Tutorial For Beginners to Advance(udemy)

Provincial Schools Sports Competition - Table Tennis - Champion (2014,

2015 and 2017)

All Island (Unranked) Table Tennis Championship (2014) - Quarter Finalist

in the Girl's Singles.

Champion of Jaffna district Inter Schools Table Tennis Championship -

(2013, 2015 and 2016).

Government dance event National level (2012)- 2nd place.

M E M B E R S H I P

Member of IEEE SLIIT Computing Society 

Member of Sri Lanka Red Cross Society from 2021

Member of Board of Prefects at School from 2017 to 2019

Band Team at School from 2013 to 2018

United Sports club (Table Tennis Player).

E X T R A - C U R R I C U L A R A C T I V I T I E S

SLIIT Table Tennis Team Player from 2023

Captain of School Table Tennis Team from 2013 to 2019.

Dancer (Bharatham) since 2010 

D E C L A R A T I O N

I do hereby certify that the above particulars furnished by me are true and

correct to the best of my knowledge and belief, and I am willing to forward

any other details you may require.

Yours Sincerely, 

Asmitha Thiraviyarasa
